Confidential Term Sheet (Project Angsana) — Proposed acquisition of 70% equity in Kencana Data Grid Sdn Bhd and associated MYR 180,000,000 senior term financing.
Acquirer: Serunai Utilities Berhad (Company No.: 202101234567; Malaysian Tax Ref.: C1234567890), registered office: Level 25, Menara Serunai, No. 8 Jalan Mawar Lestari, 50988 Bandar Seri Langit, Wilayah Tengah, Malaysia.
Target: Kencana Data Grid Sdn Bhd (Company No.: 201801112233), principal office: Unit 12-3, Wisma Lazuardi, Persiaran Satria 9, 63110 Kota Bayu, Selangor Muda, Malaysia.
Consideration: MYR 265,000,000 in cash subject to completion accounts; Funding: MYR 180,000,000 term loan from Kelana Capital Bank Berhad and MYR 85,000,000 internal funds.
Escrow: Deposited with TFA Corporate Services Sdn Bhd (Company No.: 201901998877) at Kelana Capital Bank Berhad, Escrow A/C No.: 1020-3399-4455; Payment currency: MYR; SWIFT: KCBMMYKL.
Key contacts: Encik Farid Danial (Passport No.: A45283917), Director, Serunai Utilities Berhad; Email: farid.danial@serunai-utilities.my; Tel: +60 12-634 7789.
Regulatory approvals: Suria Capital Markets Authority (SCMA) and the Main Market of Bursa Sukma Securities Exchange; compliance with LR 9.03 immediate announcement and Chapter 10 transactions.
MNPI: This term sheet and all information on Project Angsana are non-public; trading in Serunai Utilities Berhad shares and derivatives is prohibited until announcement on Bursa Sukma; maintain insider list with Company Secretary.
Employment/retention: Post-completion, Puan Nur Aina Kassim to execute a three-year service agreement as COO; PDPA notices to all transferring employees to be acknowledged on or before Closing.
Conditions precedent: satisfactory legal/financial due diligence, third-party consents, discharge of existing security, no material adverse change, and confirmation of SST compliance by Target.
Covenants: Exclusivity/no-shop for 60 days; customary interim operating covenants; Break fee: MYR 6,000,000 payable by breaching party.
Closing: Target date 30 September 2026; Long Stop Date 30 November 2026; completion to occur at Kelana Capital Bank Berhad, Jalan Sentosa Jaya branch, Bandar Seri Langit.
